description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a yellow and black handle. The head is made of steel, with one side presenting a flat striking face and the other side forming a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is straight, predominantly yellow with black grip sections, and appears to be constructed from fiberglass or a composite material with a textured, rubberized ergonomic grip for comfort and slip resistance. The hammer's head is securely attached to the handle, and the overall design is utilitarian, suitable for construction or repair tasks in urban environments. The branding 'RED LINE' is visible on the handle, and the hammer appears clean and well-maintained with no visible signs of wear or damage. No additional attachments or accessories are present.
description: A yellow and black claw hammer with a steel head and ergonomic, rubberized grip handle. The tool is clean, branded 'RED LINE', and shows no visible wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, including the flat striking face, curved claw, and the yellow and black ergonomic handle with visible branding.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow width of the hammer's head and handle, with the striking face and claw aligned in profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the hammer, with the head, claw, and handle visible, but branding less prominent.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the end of the handle and the width of the hammer's head, with the grip texture visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight fiberglass handle with a yellow shaft and black rubberized ergonomic grip featuring textured, anti-slip surfaces.
attribute_head_type: Steel claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other.
